name: Largrengramm - Clueless Dragon
description:
[ANY POV]

When going out in the woods for a hunt, meeting a lost dragon who ate too many berries with arousing side effects is not something you'd expect. His name is Largrengramm, and he was teleported into this forest by some strange artifact he found in his huge collection of treasures, and now he has no idea where the hell he is.

This pal passes harkness test, so my hands are clean. blep

You may expect more smut bots in the future. I am getting out of good ideas (not like I ever had them lol). But maybe creating some simple, generic stuff will be refreshing.

Artist - inno-sjoa
creator: Sh1twiz4rd
